title: Include background tracer and velocities in closure tendency terms

body:
Working on the distributed CG with @xkykai we figured out that the `dot` implementation was wrong, i.e. it was accounting values inside the immersed boundary which should be discarded.

This might be the issue with the custom PCG being terrible in the implicit free surface implementation?

```julia
grid = RectilinearGrid(size = (10, 10, 10), extent = (1, 1, 1))
grid = ImmersedBoundaryGrid(grid, GridFittedBottom(-0.5)) # 1000 points of which 500 active
c = CenterField(grid)
fill!(c, 1)
```
on main:
```julia
julia> dot(c, c)
1000.0

julia> sum(c)
500.0
```
on this PR
```julia
julia> dot(c, c)
500.0

julia> sum(c)
500.0
```

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Fix dot implementation
